# examplecloud_resource (List Resource)

List example resources.

Some note...

## Example Usage

### Basic

The basic configuration.

```terraform
list "examplecloud_resource" "example" {
  config {
    name = "foo"
  }
}
```

### Complete

The complete configuration.

```terraform
list "examplecloud_resource" "example" {
  config {
    name    = "foo"
    address = "bar"
    age     = 123
    role    = "Software Engineer"
  }
}
```
